first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify that the candidate lacks the mandatory C++ and specific financial domain experience. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's work locations being changed from international to US-based.
